case_title: 1238 SUTTER STREET, LLC VS. GAEHWILER CONSTRUCTION CO. et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF 1238 SUTTER STREET, LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY SERVED AUG-28-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GAEHWILER, MARTIN ALFRED
REPLY IN SUPPORT OF DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT GAEHWILER CONSTRUCTION CO. GAEHWILER, MARTIN A.

LAW AND MOTION, 302, RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANTS GAEHWILER CONSTRUCTION CO.AND MARTIN GAEHWILER'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT FOR DAMAGES IS OVERRULED (CCP 430.10(E).). THE FRAUDULENT CONCEALMENT CLAIM IS NOT CLEARLY BARRED BY THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS. (CCP 337.15(F).) PLAINTIFF 1238 SUTTER STREET, LLC HAS PLED SUFFICIENT FACTS TO ALLEGE A DUTY TO DISCLOSE PURSUANT TO CIV. CODE 1711. AS DEFENDANTS WERE THE GENERAL CONTRACTOR ON THE SUBJECT PROPERTY, THE ALLEGATIONS INDICATE "THAT 'THE DEFENDANT MUST NECESSARILY POSSESS FULL INFORMATION CONCERNING THE FACTS OF THE CONTROVERSY' [CITATIONS.]" (TARMANN V. STATE FARM MUT. AUTO. INS. CO. (1991) 2 CAL.APP.4TH 153, 158.) THE COURT GAVE 20 DAYS LEAVE TO FILE AN ANSWER. NOTICE WAS WAIVED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT ; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR # 5976

MASTER CALENDAR JURY

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-14-2014 Continued To Jun-11-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-14-2014 Overruled
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ROBERT N. WEAVER OF LESS & WEAVER, TEL. NO. 398-9800 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. DEVIN C. CORTEAU OF THE ROPERS MAJESKI & BENTLEY LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 543-4800 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS GAEHWILER CONSTRUCTION CO.and MARTIN GAEHWILER's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT FOR DAMAGES is Overruled (CCP 430.10(e).). The fraudulent concealment claim is not clearly barred by the statute of limitations. (CCP 337.15(f).) Plaintiff 1238 Sutter Street, LLC has pled sufficient facts to allege a duty to disclose pursuant to Civ. Code 1711. As Defendants were the general contractor on the subject property, the allegations indicate "that 'the defendant must necessarily possess full information concerning the facts of the controversy' [Citations.]" (Tarmann v. State Farm Mut. Auto. Ins. Co. (1991) 2 Cal.App.4th 153, 158.) The court gave 20 days leave to file an Answer. Notice was waived. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert ; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =(302/EHG)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT

Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR# 5976.
